source_document.path: /Users/mikhailananyin/Documents/WeRa Global/Customers/Fonseca Gardens/Fonseca Gardens — Business Model, Brand Playbook & Digital Infrastructure Guide (Odoo + Gitea).md
source_document.purpose: Primary business and brand source for Fonseca Gardens website page creation in Odoo.

high_confidence_public_claims: Fonseca Gardens operates in the Lisbon region with Sintra as a key area.
Brand positioning is subscription-first garden maintenance with transparent communication and accountability.
Founder narrative is central to trust and differentiation and should be present on core web pages.
Primary website tone should be professional, clear, and reliable.
The first conversion objective is lead capture and CRM-managed manual consultation callback acquisition.
claims_requiring_external_revalidation_b: Exact Portugal landscaping market size and growth numbers.
Any dated macro-market projections and ad-performance benchmarks.
copy_guardrails: Use 'Above & beyond. Every garden.' as the primary public tagline.
Keep 'Let me trim your bush.' for social campaigns only, not core website hero copy.
Avoid unverifiable superlatives; prioritize concrete service promises.
Use multilingual trust framing (EN/PT, plus sensitivity to RU-speaking clients) without overclaiming language coverage.

brand_core.positioning_statement: Fonseca Gardens delivers subscription-first garden maintenance in Sintra, Cascais, and the Lisbon region with international standards, transparent proof-of-work communication, and accountable follow-through.

customer_segments: Expat homeowners seeking clear communication and reliability
Absentee property owners needing autonomous service and reporting
Condominium/property managers seeking recurring outdoor maintenance

content_optimization_targets.hero_support_message: Subscription-first maintenance with photo-backed proof-of-work and accountable communication.
content_optimization_targets.consultation_flow_message: Consultation requests are confirmed manually from CRM callback queue (target initial response in 4 business hours).
trust_block_points: Visit confirmation before each scheduled operation
Before/after evidence after each maintenance visit
Written scope and quote before recurring service begins

request_background.theme: Premium Lisbon-region residential garden at golden hour, healthy layered greenery, clean stone paths, subtle terracotta accents, no stock-photo look.
request_background.ratio: 16:9 safe center crop with headline-safe negative space on left third.
request_background.exposition: Convey calm professionalism, reliability, and high-maintenance standards suitable for expat homeowners.

service_icon_maintenance.theme: Minimal line icon for recurring maintenance (pruning shears + leaf) in brand green on transparent background.
service_icon_maintenance.exposition: Represents subscription routine care and punctual repeat visits.

service_icon_irrigation.theme: Minimal line icon for irrigation checks (water droplet + sprinkler arc), consistent with maintenance icon style.
service_icon_irrigation.exposition: Represents irrigation inspection and adjustment reliability.

proof_block_before_after.theme: Matched-angle before/after photo pair of same garden zone with strong improvement visibility.
proof_block_before_after.ratio: 4:3 each panel, consistent framing between before and after.
proof_block_before_after.exposition: Demonstrate proof-of-work reporting standard and measurable upkeep quality.
proof_block_before_after.format: jpg, two files each 1600x1200 minimum, high quality with mild compression.

team_action_photo.theme: Founder/crew actively working in real garden environment, natural light, branded workwear optional but clean.
team_action_photo.exposition: Show hands-on execution, accountability, and founder-led operations.

cta_banner_visual.theme: Clean consultation callback banner visual with subtle phone/message motif integrated into garden context.
cta_banner_visual.exposition: Communicate "request callback" action without implying self-service appointment booking.

value_proposition: Manual consultation callback flow handled from CRM with clear response SLA
Annual contract option with discount positioning

partners_page.goal: Present the WeRa partner network and route users to the first partner profile.
required_sections: First partner callout card for Fonseca Gardens

fonseca_partner_page.goal: Convert visitors into qualified leads and service consultations for Fonseca Gardens.
required_sections: Hero with brand tagline and service area
Lead capture CTA (quote/contact) and consultation callback CTA
